HGSS.673.0001:
It was fun battling you!
I’d love to trade phone numbers with\r
you, please?\r
Come on, let’s trade numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.673.0002:
Thanks! Let’s have another battle
again sometime!\f
Just give me a call when you’re ready.
HGSS.673.0003:
Ulp!\f
Are you saying you think I’m so weak,
I don’t measure up as an opponent?
HGSS.673.0004:
I’d do anything to get your phone
number!\f
Please, let’s trade numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.673.0005:
Oh yeah.
This is a Shiny Stone.\f
It’s all right, don’t be shy! You can
have it. Go ahead!\f
HGSS.673.0006:
Huh? There’s something odd about your
voice... Don’t tell me... You’re\r
standing nearby, aren’t you?\f
If you’ve already gotten this close,
why not come talk in person?
HGSS.673.0007:
I’m still a featherweight, as usual...\f
My constant companion, [0100,000A,0000],
is training hard!\f
It even knocked out a [0100,000B,0000] in
under two seconds in a recent battle!\f
OK, OK, two seconds is a bit of an
exaggeration... It was actually five\r
minutes and 37 seconds...
HGSS.673.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] has gotten pretty
strong!\f
Well, it’s gotten strong, but this
[0100,000B,0000] it was battling ran away\r
before the fight was over...\f
That was [0100,000A,0000]’s fault, right?\f
It was my fault?\f
I guess that’s a possibility!
HGSS.673.0009:
Earlier, I was contemplating something
while walking...\f
Suddenly this [0100,000B,0000] jumped out!\f
I was pretty surprised, and then it
ran away!\f
I was thinking about it, and I had made
plans to trade with a friend, so I was\r
looking for a [0100,000B,0000]...\f
It’s too bad...
HGSS.673.0010:
Where are you now? I’m always on
[0104,0003,0000] myself.\f
What do you think about battling with me
again? Sounds like a good idea?\r
I’ll be waiting!
HGSS.673.0012:
Ah... Ah... Achoo!\f
Ah... Ah... Ah... Achoo!\f
Oh, it’s nothing. It’s just that my bird
Pokémon suddenly started flapping its\r
wings...so there’s dust and stuff from\r
their wings floating around my face...\r
Ah... Ah... Now my nose is itchy...\f
Achoooo!
HGSS.673.0013:
My Pokémon was holding something in its
mouth recently.\f
I was thinking “What in the world?” and
I pulled it out... It was a Shiny Stone!\r
I was surprised. Wouldn’t you be?\f
...But what’s a Shiny Stone?\f
I don’t really have any use for it, and
I don’t know what it’s worth...so I’ll\r
just give it to you!\f
I’ll wait for you on [0104,0003,0000].
Come get it!
HGSS.673.0014:
You want a Shiny Stone, right?
I’m on [0104,0003,0000]. Come get it!
